description_long: This is a modern, rectangular garage structure with a flat roof and clean, minimalist lines. The front features a large, white sectional garage door with horizontal paneling and a small handle, as well as a website label 'Supermonolit.ru' on the upper left. One side of the building has a row of large, dark-tinted windows, providing natural light to the interior. The opposite side includes a single, plain entry door, likely for pedestrian access. The exterior is finished in smooth, light gray concrete or plaster with dark trim around the roofline. The overall design is utilitarian and contemporary, suitable for urban or suburban environments.
description: A modern, flat-roofed garage with a sectional door, large side windows, and minimalist gray exterior. Features clean lines and a utilitarian, contemporary style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white sectional garage door, website label, and dark roof trim.
description_view_1: Side view with a row of large, dark-tinted windows spanning most of the wall.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain, unadorned wall and no visible openings or features.
description_view_3: Side view with a single, plain entry door and smooth wall surface.
